channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin used as dog waste bin, 19th July
item.description:
Bin is constantly being used as a dog waste bin. Bags either placed on top or down the side & often stuffed in when the bin is full causing foxes to drag the bags out and covering the floor in dog waste!!! (Quite often by neighboring properties not using their own bins for dog waste). This bin is next to the school bus stop which is in constant use by young children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over Walford road, 19th July
item.description:
The best turkish kebab litter all over the street. It’s disgusting and happened every weekend

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation and metal, 19th July
item.description:
Street is an absolute mess and has been for years. No effort to by the council to fix

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodmore Mews, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rossendale Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line on junction of Ilderton Road and Rotherhithe New Roads nearly invisible, 19th July
item.description:
The stop lines, including the ASL, on Ilderton Road, at the junction with Rotherhithe New Roads are so faded that they are nearly invisible. Motor vehicles are liable to crowd around cyclist stopped at the stop line, when they should be behind the ASL.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, Ilderton Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Down alley next to high rise, shrubbery excessively grown, 19th July
item.description:
Down alley next to high rise, shrubbery excessively grown. Have avoided the route when needing to travel with
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and household goods left under the bridge, 19th July
item.description:
House hold rubbish left under the Crossways/Eastgate close jcn under the bridge.Been there for weeks .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction, 19th July
item.description:
Barrie’s remain uncollected and ground tree stump blocking safe passage on bust road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Road, Bickley, Greater London

item.title: Advertising sign, adding to mess of other signs on that corner., 19th July
item.description:
Several signs already, don’t need someone advertising their private business on a street corner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Banchory Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and bigger stuff ts a, 19th July
item.description:
Its a mess flytipping and litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cronin Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish piling up at illegal short term let, 19th July
item.description:
This property is an illegal short term let which contravenes the 90 days per year regulation. The high turn over of “guests” means that waste is produced in quantities of that of a business and not a domestic premises. Contact details: George Wilkinson 0800 669 6797 hello@onsiteproperties.co.uk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Standard Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pothole, 19th July
item.description:
Pothole on the south side of Ladywell Road (i.e. westbound side), just to west of the crest of the road over the rail bridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, St. John's Vale, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timetable sign broken, 19th July
item.description:
Damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike in middle of pavement 19/7/26, 19th July
item.description:
Someone's left their lime bike right in the middle of the pavement, massively inconsiderate of people pushing buggies, using wheelchairs or who are visually impaired. Please fine the rider, Lime!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag on green telecoms box, 19th July
item.description:
Black pen tag on the pavement side of this green telecoms cabinet, just in front of the girls school on Lennard Rd, close to junction with Reddons Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 19th July
item.description:
A double bagged dead fox is ready to be collected by street clensing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frankswood Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: Filthy mattress and other junk, 19th July

item.title: Car has been abandoned, 19th July
